name: mirror-vs
description: An interactive, sidebar-based AI Pair Programmer for VS Code supporting local Ollama and DeepSeek APIs with streaming completions.
author: Dipesh Majithia

mirror-vs.ollamaHost.description: The API base URL for your local Ollama instance.

mirror-vs.defaultOllamaModel.description: The default local Ollama model to use when starting a chat.

mirror-vs.defaultProvider.description: The default active LLM provider when launching the assistant.

mirror-vs.agentInputTokenBudget.description: Adaptive soft input token budget (in tokens).

mirror-vs.agentInputTokenHardMax.description: Generous ceiling for auto-derived budget path for long-context models.

mirror-vs.teacherEnabled.description: Enable teacher-student escalation loop on self-hosted/local model failures.

mirror-vs.teacherModel.description: Model to use as the senior teacher model for failure recovery (format: provider/model).

mirror-vs.maxTurnsBeforeSummarize.description: Maximum turns before the conversation context is compressed.

mirror-vs.turnsToRetain.description: Number of recent turns to retain as active conversation context after compression.

mirror-vs.skillsEnabled.description: Enable distilled skills learning and injection.

mirror-vs.maxSkillsToKeep.description: Maximum number of learned skills to retain in workspace memory.

mirror-vs.planFirst.description: Enforce Plan-First Execution Mode. The agent must declare an <implementation_plan> before executing file modifications.

mirror-vs.customSystemPrompt.description: A custom instructions prefix prepended to the agent's system prompt (e.g. 'Prefer functional components').

mirror-vs.agentMode.description: Select the active agent mode. Normal is for general tasks, Refactor focuses on restructuring, Debug attaches to debugger.

mirror-vs.customEndpointEnabled.description: Enable custom OpenAI-compatible API endpoint provider.

mirror-vs.customEndpointUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. Together, Groq, vLLM, Azure).

mirror-vs.customEndpointModel.description: Default model name for the custom endpoint.

mirror-vs.customApis.description: List of configured custom OpenAI-compatible API providers.

mirror-vs.maxToolOutputLength.description: Maximum character length for tool execution output in conversation history. Excess output is truncated to save tokens.

mirror-vs.enableTruncationGuardrail.description: Prevent the agent from accidentally truncating files (deleting >50% of lines in files over 50 lines).

mirror-vs.aiReviewEnabled.description: Enable post-save AI code review. After saving a file, Mirror VS will analyze your changes and provide suggestions.

mirror-vs.multiFileRefactorEnabled.description: Enable atomic multi-file refactoring with automatic rollback on failure.

mirror-vs.embeddingModel.description: Ollama embedding model for semantic search. Requires Ollama running with this model pulled.

mirror-vs.autonomousMode.description: When enabled, Mirror VS will automatically accept file changes after a 10-second countdown instead of waiting for manual approval. Enables fully agentic autonomous execution.

mirror-vs.autoApproveWrite.description: When enabled, Mirror VS will automatically perform file write/edit/create/delete operations without prompting you for manual approval.

mirror-vs.autoApproveCommand.description: When enabled, Mirror VS will automatically execute terminal/shell commands without prompting you for manual approval.

mirror-vs.autoApproveBrowser.description: When enabled, Mirror VS will automatically perform browser navigate, click, type, and execute script actions without prompting you for manual approval.

mirror-vs.browserToolsEnabled.description: When enabled, the assistant has access to the embedded browser tools (navigate, click, type, screenshot, execute script).

mirror-vs.embeddingSearchMinScore.description: Minimum similarity score threshold for embedding-based semantic search results.

mirror-vs.maxEmbeddingResults.description: Maximum results returned from embedding-based semantic search.

mirror-vs.geminiApiKey.description: Google Gemini API key. Required to use the Gemini provider.

mirror-vs.geminiModel.description: Default Gemini model to use (gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-pro, etc.).

mirror-vs.openrouterApiKey.description: OpenRouter API key. Provides access to 200+ models through a unified API.

mirror-vs.openrouterModel.description: Default OpenRouter model (e.g. anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, openai/gpt-4o, google/gemini-2.0-flash-001).

mirror-vs.litellmEnabled.description: Enable LiteLLM proxy provider. LiteLLM normalizes 100+ LLM APIs into an OpenAI-compatible format.

mirror-vs.maxProjectMapLines.description: Maximum number of lines for the auto-generated project map tree shown to the agent on first turn. Lower values save tokens.

mirror-vs.litellmBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the LiteLLM proxy server.

mirror-vs.litellmModel.description: Default LiteLLM model to use (model name as known to your LiteLLM instance).

mirror-vs.mcpServers.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configurations for dynamic tool discovery.

mirror-vs.customModes.description: Custom agent modes with tool restrictions and system prompts.

mirror-vs.checkpointEnabled.description: Enable git-based snapshots before dangerous file operations. Allows automatic rollback on failure.

mirror-vs.mirrorBridgeEnabled.description: Enable polling the Mirror Assistant Bridge on localhost:3000 for external task injection. Disabled by default for security.

mirror-vs.telemetryEnabled.description: Enable anonymous usage telemetry. Disabled by default — enables only with user consent.

mirror-vs.modelContextLengths.description: Custom model context window size overrides (e.g. { 'my-custom-model': 32000 }). Maps substring of model name to context length in tokens.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
